violations.text: The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (dumpster) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The (ceiling vents ) in the (kitchen) area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Hot water knob on hand sink is in poor repair. Observed missing knob New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was (3010) parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for (lactic acid ) sanitizer is (704-1875 ) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (outside refuse) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood/ventilation unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
